channel.title: LEXOLEN Blog Feed
channel.description: Latest research and blog posts from LEXOLEN

item.title: Bypassing EDR with direct syscalls – a practical guide
item.description: A practical walkthrough on bypassing endpoint detection and response solutions using direct syscalls.

item.title: Hunting for Cobalt Strike in encrypted traffic
item.description: Techniques for detecting Cobalt Strike activity hidden within encrypted network traffic.

item.title: Linux kernel exploit development – heap spraying
item.description: Exploring heap spraying techniques in Linux kernel exploit development.
